subject: RE: Approved Design - Modern Elegance Theme
body: Thank you Mariana for the design approval. I have noted the Modern Elegance theme with Gold Burgundy Ivory palette and the requirement for formal white linens with no substitutes. I will ensure all suppliers follow these specifications exactly.

subject: RE: Formal White Linen Napkins - Quote #PEL-2026-4481
body: Thank you for the quote. I am reviewing the $285 pricing for 48 formal white linen napkins. This requires internal approval before confirmation. I will follow up by end of day tomorrow.

subject: Current budget status: $400 remaining. Quote total $285 exceeds immediate approval authority - requires Chris Murray sign-off per business rules. Proceeding with draft only pending authorization.
